blended.narrative: Whitefish Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,306 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.8" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 41".
